creator: doktornotor@mailinator.com
text: What's up here? In discussion? It's broken, end of discussion. What upstream? You blame upstream and then stop taking updates from them (https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=167057)? 6 years, nothing done, fabulous really. FYI, this is so bad it totally kills some websites, as in, not usable with IPv6 at all.
